about.metaDescription: StudentX helps students find housing near their university in Thessaloniki, Greece. Free for students, free for landlords.
about.title: About StudentX
about.intro: StudentX is a student housing directory built for Thessaloniki. By students, for students.
about.missionBody: We bridge the gap between students and landlords. With a purpose-built platform that puts proximity to campus at the center of every search.
about.step1Body: Pick your faculty, set your budget and preferences, and see listings ranked by distance to your classes.
about.step2Body: Send an inquiry directly through the platform. No middlemen, no fees for students.
about.step3Body: Find your place, sign your lease, and focus on what matters — your studies.
about.contactBody: Have a question or want to partner with us? Reach out to us!

login.title: Landlord Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your listings
login.roleConflictStudentTitle: This email is registered as a student.
login.roleConflictStudentBody: Each StudentX email can be either a student or a landlord — not both. Switch to the student login to continue.

signup.title: Create a Landlord Account
signup.subtitle: List your property for free

signup.photoTooLarge: That image is too large. Please choose one under 8 MB.

dashboard.title: My listings
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Delete this listing? This cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteBody: Delete {address}? This permanently removes the listing and its inquiries. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteError: Failed to delete listing. Please try again.
dashboard.getVerifiedDesc: Upload your ID for a free Verified badge — shown on all your listings.

getVerified.title: Get Verified
getVerified.description: Verification is central to the safety of the StudentX community. It lets students know that you are a genuine account holder. The SuperLandlord badge appears publicly over your property, and also gives you priority search placement.
getVerified.stripeNote: Secure checkout via Stripe. Cancel anytime.

listingForm.titleHint: The public name of your listing — students see this everywhere they encounter it. Up to 80 characters.
listingForm.titleSameAsAddress: Tip: this is just your address. Try a memorable name ("Sunny 2BR", "Top floor near AHEPA") so students remember your listing.
listingForm.coordsOptional: Optional — helps students find your property on the map.
listingForm.coordsHelp: Find coordinates on <link>Google Maps</link> by right-clicking your property.
listingForm.descriptionTip: Tip: Mention proximity to campus, transport, and supermarkets. Highlight what makes your place stand out — furnished, balcony, quiet street, natural light.
listingForm.photosHint: JPG, PNG or WebP · max 10 MB each · up to 6 photos
listingForm.photosHintUnlimited: JPG, PNG or WebP · max 10 MB each · unlimited photos
listingForm.photosError: Some files could not be uploaded.
listingForm.photosInvalidType: Only JPG, PNG and WebP are allowed.
listingForm.photosReorderHint: Tap the arrows to reorder (or drag on desktop). The first photo is shown as the main image.
listingForm.importedPhotos: {count, plural, one {# imported photo} other {# imported photos}} — saved with listing
listingForm.previewBanner: Preview — this is how students will see your listing
listingForm.previewDirectTagline: Direct with the landlord. No brokers, no fees.
listingForm.previewInquireNote: Students message you directly — disabled in preview

landing.headline: Curated student housing in Thessaloniki.
landing.programmeLede: Every landlord in the Aristotle × StudentX programme is vetted. Walking time to the School of Medicine is calculated automatically.

hub.description: Curated student housing across Greece, Cyprus, the UK and Ireland. Pick a city to begin.
hub.searchPlaceholder: Hover over your city or find it below

comingSoon.subtitle: Listings will appear here when {city} launches. We're hand-curating each city, one at a time, so the directory stays trustworthy.
